title: satureja acinos subsp. meridionalis
intro: Satureja acinos subsp. meridionalis, also known as Mediterranean savory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues and relieve pain. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system due to its high concentration of antioxidants and essential oils like carvacrol and borneol. Medicinal preparations of Satureja acinos subsp. meridionalis include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, ease muscle tension, and promote relaxation.
